title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXI. Jingles.
content:
Sing, sing, what shall I sing?
        The cat has eat the pudding-string;
        Do, do, what shall I do?
        The cat has bit it quite in two.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXI. Jingles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
